top_signals.title: Southern Copper plans $319M Cuajone mine overhaul
top_signals.summary: Peru mine upgrades aim to cut costs, sustain output and improve efficiency as ore grades decline at key sites.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Lawmakers introduce SILVER Act to increase precious metals storage sites in US
top_signals.summary: The bill aims to amend the Commodity Exchange Act to reduce systemic risk while increasing geographical diversity and competition.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
